### DATE UNIT COUNT
Counts how many `to_unit` values are contained in a single `from_unit` period for `date`.

```esql
ROW dt = to_datetime("2024-02-15T00:00:00.000Z")
| EVAL days = DATE_UNIT_COUNT("day", "month", dt)
```
